resources.string:
If your device has a speech recognition service available a microphone button will be displayed at the bottom of the main screen.

 To use, press the microphone button and say a command.

 The following commands (English only) can be spoken;
 'Help' - This help screen
 'New game' - Start a new game
 'Resign' - Resign current game
 'Undo' - Undo last move
 'Edit' - Toggle edit mode

 This feature requires permission to use your Microphone. This is managed via your app settings.

This feature requires permission to use your Microphone.

To grant this permission, press the open app settings button below, then select Permissions and enable Microphone.

Alternatively from your main Android screen, open Settings-> Apps-> Karuah Chess-> Permissions, and enable Microphone.

Karuah Chess is a chess playing program.
Copyright © 2020 Karuah Software
You can visit us at https://www.facebook.com/karuahchess.
Karuah Chess uses StockFish. You can find out more about StockFish at https://stockfishchess.org.\n
The full source code for Karuah Chess is available at https://github.com/karuahsoftware/karuahchess.\n

string.name: license_title
string.b: Karuah Chess is distributed under the GNU General Public License Version 3 (GPLv3).

resources.string: Karuah Chess is free software: you can redistribute it and/or modify it under the terms of the GNU General Public License as published by the Free Software Foundation, either version 3 of the License, or (at your option) any later version.

Karuah Chess is distributed in the hope that it will be useful,but WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE. See the GNU General Public License for full details at https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.txt.\n
